title: Fabulous Valleys
description: A modpack that aims to make your minecraft beautiful.
body: This modpack aims to make your game look beautiful. Although mostly texture packs and shaders, you'll see the Minecraft you know and love, but prettier. Make sure you have a good GPU, as Rethinking Voxels is not easy on the GPU. Other than shaders, there are some UI texture packs as well as low fire, low shield, etc. You can also look at the latest version's dependencies to check out exactly what I stuffed in there.
